user.title: Connect to TaskPilot
user.description: Enter your TaskPilot API details. Generate an API key in TaskPilot → Settings → API Keys.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to TaskPilot. Check the URL and that the service is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Generate one in TaskPilot → Settings → API Keys.

abort.already_configured: This TaskPilot instance is already configured.
